Mandatory text: Consulte la información de prescripción completa

strictRules: Matching is case-insensitive but must use the exact casing and markup specified above.
Only match whole phrases; do not match partial substrings.
Preserve ALL existing HTML tags and attributes, and do NOT inject or remove tags other than the specified wrappers.
ALWAYS preserve <sup> tags around ® and ™ symbols. These tags are required for brand name symbols.
Avoid nested identical wrappers (no …${isBackgroundHighlight ? '' : ', no duplicate wrappers around the same text'}). If text already contains the exact intended wrapper, do not re-wrap.
Preserve original language, wording, punctuation, and whitespace. Do NOT translate, summarize, or alter meaning.
Apply replacements globally and independently; multiple rules may apply to the same text but do not create duplicate or nested identical tags.
Do not alter bracketed references, citations, or URLs.

${isBackgroundHighlight ? '• CRITICAL: DO NOT use any <span style='color:#CF0A2C;'> or <span style='color:#939598;'> tags. NO COLOR STYLING ALLOWED.' : '• When a rule requires both bold and color for overlapping content, avoid nesting identical tags: prefer <b> for numeric/factual emphasis and <span style='color:#CF0A2C;'> for clinical keywords — choose the combination that preserves clarity and avoids duplicate wrappers (e.g., wrap keywords in span and numeric percentage in bold as separate non-nested wrappers).'}
